x=D(k)local z=function(z,b,O,r)return u(i,{z;b,O,r},k,x)end return z end,function(i,k)local x=D(k)local z=function()return u(i,{},k,x)end return z end,157781+-157781,function()S=S+(-756146+756147)H[S]=-87002-(-87003)return S end return(a(4420184-134958,{}))(x(g))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[k(292761-340158)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
